message:
fix(connectors): harden secret redaction, URL traversal detection, and apply rustfmt

Security improvements across multiple connectors:

- email-generic: Replace derived Debug on ImapConfig and SmtpConfig with
  custom implementations that redact the password field as "[REDACTED]",
  preventing accidental credential leakage in log output
- outlook/client: Add custom Debug impl for OutlookClient that redacts
  access_token; extend sanitize_id() to reject URL-encoded path traversal
  sequences (%2f, %5c, %2e%2e) in addition to raw characters; replace
  unwrap_or with unwrap_or_else for lazy evaluation on error path
- outlook/types: Add custom Debug impl for OutlookConfig redacting
  access_token; fix doc-comment backtick formatting for clippy
- outlook/connector: Extract invoke_inner() from invoke() so that
  record_request() correctly tracks both successes and failures (previously
  only tracked successes); add parse_top() helper using safe u32::try_from
  instead of truncating as-u32 cast that could silently wrap on large values
- outlook/error: Mark retry_after() as const fn for compile-time evaluation
- sonos/error: Reformat ConnectorErrorMapping impl for clarity

Apply rustfmt formatting across all connector crates: apple-notes,
apple-reminders, bluebubbles, email-generic, irc, nostr, outlook,
sonos, and synology-chat. Formatting changes are limited to line wrapping
and brace alignment with no behavioral changes outside the items above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
